description: §38.1 clean neg — a `<channel>` declared as a child of `<program>` is the canonical v0.3 placement; E-CHANNEL-OUTSIDE-PROGRAM stays silent. The delta from `channel/outside-program` is the channel moving inside the `<program>` body.
rationale: §38.1 / §38.2: a `<channel>` at programDepth >= 1 (descendant of `<program>`) is the canonical placement and SHALL NOT fire E-CHANNEL-OUTSIDE-PROGRAM.
